---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like?
A clear description of the feature or tool you'd like added.

## Example Claude query
What would you type into Claude if this feature existed?
> e.g. "Show me my assignment submission history for HIT234"

## Why is this useful?
How would this help students?

## Blackboard page/section
Which part of Blackboard contains this information?
(e.g. My Grades, Course Calendar, Discussion Board)
